author: coordinator-2
authorized_by: coordination-directive 2026-07-08 (fix the gaps F1 exposed + build the missing analyses); registrar acting as coordinator-2
changes: corpus pins regenerated under kot-corpus-hash/1; the task-family-token-sample PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder is replaced by a real pinned corpus, data/task-family-tinystories (byte-identical copy of the 2026-07-07 pre-declared TinyStories-validation content-word table; provenance in its README)

measurement redesigned to a DETERMINISTIC ON-BOX CENSUS (correction c-m0b-1): coverage = fraction of the pre-declared target-task content-word token mass whose lemma is in the kernel vocabulary at each rung, computed by the pinned instrument tools/experiments/m0b_instrument.py with no annotators; the seed design's 2000-token sampling, GATE-H human spot-check, and Wilson-bound endpoint are dropped WITH the sampling they existed to police — a census has no sampling error and count-based criteria carry no test (P1 common rules)

membership coverage is a crude LOWER BOUND of the original judgment-based 'plausible profile-1 explication' estimate; the judgment-based numbers remain exploratory context in mapper/m0/ and are not citable

analysis/m0b.py rewritten to the census contract with a monotone-rung-ladder instrument gate; primary endpoint /analysis/coverage_fraction vs the unchanged X=0.20 NICHE-SCOPE default; primary rung unchanged (molecules-v0); wn31-aligned rung explicitly labelled the AxiomsOnly-reachable band, never quoted as explicated coverage
corpus_pin_defect: Corpus pins regenerated under kot-corpus-hash/1 (tools/registry/corpus-pin.py; recipe string embedded in pins.corpus_hashes._recipe). The GNG-0-seed digests did not reproduce under their own stated recipe in ~40 literal interpretations (pin-GENERATION defect surfaced by the F1 exploratory run seq 0, pins_observed block; corpus files were git-clean throughout — no data drift). prereg-freeze now recomputes every non-placeholder corpus digest at freeze time and refuses mismatches (ERR_P2_CORPUS_PIN); registry-check gained a --corpus-pins check.
kill_criterion_status: kill criterion verbatim text UNCHANGED (RT-7 NICHE-SCOPE banner consequence; X = 20% default, maintainer may reset at GNG-0 signing)
legitimacy: Lawful pre-registration correction, NOT a post-hoc amendment: at correction time GNG-0 had NOT been maintainer-signed (frozen-index _meta records external timestamping as deferred) and the experiment's results-log contained NO phase:final run record (f1's log holds one exploratory-phase record only; m0b/g6/g7 have no logs). The P-9 design-amendment cutoff (first final-phase run) was therefore not crossed for any corrected record. The provisional freeze was reset to DRAFT, corrected, and re-frozen through prereg-freeze under the same tooling lints plus the new freeze-time corpus-pin verification.
